allow: Bash(node -e "const webpush = require\('web-push'\); const keys = webpush.generateVAPIDKeys\(\); console.log\('VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY=' + keys.publicKey\); console.log\('VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY=' + keys.privateKey\);")

Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./package.json'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\({deps: Object.keys\(p.dependencies\), devDeps: Object.keys\(p.devDependencies || {}\), node: p.engines}, null, 2\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const f = require\('@ffmpeg-installer/ffmpeg'\); console.log\('path:', f.path, 'version:', f.version\)")

Bash(node -e "const f = require\('@ffmpeg-installer/ffmpeg'\); const {execSync} = require\('child_process'\); try { const out = execSync\('\\"' + f.path + '\\" -version 2>&1'\).toString\(\); console.log\(out.split\('\\n'\)[0]\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('Error:', e.message\); }")
